use_cases: Enable users to sign in with social media providers like Google, GitHub, or Apple
Provide a unified authentication entry point for web applications
Simplify registration by reducing form fields through social login
Support multiple authentication methods within a single UI component
Create branded login experiences for SaaS and e-commerce platforms
ai_summary: A social authentication card component featuring the Ruixen.Ui design system with a flexible Button component supporting multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Designed for implementing social login flows with providers like Google, GitHub, and Apple. Uses clean Tailwind styling with subtle shadows and rounded corners for a modern, accessible authentication experience.
